packedConformance.required: 41 executable components and 124/124 vectors passed for React, Vue, Svelte, and Solid; downstream execution uses exact tarballs and scripts/observable-browser-runner.mjs

docsAndExamples.required: 41/41 independently compiling exact-artifact examples plus complete reference/tutorial/how-to/explanation coverage

kitchenSink.required: production homepage contains a responsive, accessible, light/dark, package-backed Vue/Svelte/Solid application composition generated from receipt eligibility; omissions and reasons remain visible

release.required: clean detached Node 22/npm 11 release succeeds twice and package/deploy payload hashes are deterministic twice

production.required: two passing production proofs cover 390/768/1440, framework switching, trusted interactions, overflow, diagnostics, package hashes/content types, headers, worker identity, /health, /version, PWA, SEO/share, sitemap, and llms.txt

finalReceipt.required: one immutable terminal receipt references every accepted prerequisite and reports no hidden failed, blocked, pending, or not-run executable gate

humanOnly: Configure a Git remote and upload the prepared GitHub release
Manual HMR or screen-reader scope only when explicitly approved instead of executed
forbidden: skips, allowlists, exceptions, inventory reduction, or optimistic metrics

executionPolicy.fanOut: Fan out read-only discovery immediately and mutation work only across disjoint path scopes. One owner controls shared IR, shared runner, receipts, progress, release, deploy, and production paths at a time.
executionPolicy.integration: Integrate only focused-green batches; regenerate exact artifacts and receipts after each accepted capability family.
executionPolicy.selfSteering: Every loop run reads machine facts, selects the highest critical-path unblocked task, repairs stale plans or receipts, cancels drifted agents, and never repeats a status-only run when an automatable task exists.
executionPolicy.selfHealing: On failure classify source, emitter, fixture, harness, package, or environment; repair the lowest shared layer; rerun focused tests twice; preserve failed diagnostics; rollback only the isolated batch if invariants regress.
executionPolicy.stop: Delete the loop only after the final terminal receipt passes. Stop and report only for explicit human authorization, external authentication, or irreducible upstream blocks outside executable scope.
